title: post api auth callback credentials with valid and invalid inputs
description: Test the POST /api/auth/callback/credentials endpoint with valid email and password to ensure successful authentication and session creation, and with invalid credentials to verify proper error handling and denial of access.

title: get api notifications recent with and without authentication
description: Test the GET /api/notifications/recent endpoint with a valid authenticated session to verify retrieval of recent notifications and with no or invalid authentication to confirm access is denied and proper redirection or error response is returned.
